commands.summary: Backend TypeScript build passed after adding the contact timeline read model and authenticated API route.
Renderer TypeScript build and esbuild bundle passed after adding contact timeline API types, client method, modal UI, and styles.
Focused backend coverage passed: 30/30 tests. CLV-017 coverage verifies merged message/call/agent timeline ordering, default agent-detail redaction, explicit reveal, and authenticated HTTP contract.
Renderer interaction coverage passed: 24/24 tests. Contact edit coverage verifies timeline rendering, default private-agent redaction, and explicit reveal toggle.
Full Electron suite passed: 79 tests passed and 1 opt-in live Twilio test skipped by design.

Visual smoke passed and produced Electron/dist/ui-preview.png, Electron/dist/ui-calls-preview.png, and Electron/dist/ui-contact-timeline-preview.png. The smoke asserts the contact timeline modal renders actual timeline rows before capture.
Regenerated audits/reports/dashboard.md so Repopact reflects CLV-017 as satisfied with the new evidence run.
Repopact doctor reported the repository healthy after CLV-017 records were updated.
Repository governance validation passed with the CLV-017 work item and evidence metadata current.
Local system audit passed: required files, work item manifests, stale README checks, and markdown link/date checks are valid.
Production dependency audit completed with 0 high-or-higher vulnerabilities.

environment.process_note: 015 CLV-017 (contact timeline). ForgeLink now exposes a contact-specific timeline that merges ordinary SMS/MMS messages, voice call rows, and agent-originated requests. Ordinary communication details are visible in the contact detail surface; private agent request content remains redacted by default and is revealed only when the operator explicitly enables private agent details.
